children.heading: Supported employment services
children.label: a Supported employment services
children.text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to prohibit a State from providing supported employment services in accordance with the State plan submitted under by using funds made available through a State allotment under .section 721 of this titlesection 730 of this title

children.heading: Postemployment services
children.label: b Postemployment services
children.text: Nothing in this subchapter shall be construed to prohibit a State from providing discrete postemployment services in accordance with the State plan submitted under by using funds made available through a State allotment under to an individual who is eligible under this subchapter.section 721 of this titlesection 730 of this title
